caption: Orders-queue phase 2 (#523): the movement maneuvers now execute off the Order queue -- the wheel's swing goal and hinge, a rear move's about-face phase and parked march, and the drill turns all live on current_order instead of scattered Unit flags. The clip is the standard wheel drill (select the infantry block, C wheels it right, Z wheels it back left) driven through the real controls: the maneuver itself must look exactly as before (the standing flank plants, the line swings like a door), which is the point -- the migration preserves behaviour. What IS new on screen: the info panel now reads the maneuver straight off the queue, reporting 'Wheeling' while the swing runs where it used to say 'Holding position'. Verified tick-by-tick in the GUT suite: the #517 conversio holds every body frozen through the full turn, and the #521 nudge covers the full NUDGE_DISTANCE, both read from exact game state.
